headline: Super Micro Board Probes Export Allegations As Valuation Signals Potential Upside
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has launched an independent investigation into alleged illegal exports of AI hardware to China linked to three individuals, including a co founder and senior staff. The company is not named as a defendant in the March 2026 indictment. Those involved have been placed on leave and key relationships have been terminated while the review is underway. Independent board members and external legal counsel have been appointed to oversee the investigation. For...

headline: High Dividends Turn Telecom Stocks Into Market’s New Haven Play
summary: (Bloomberg) -- An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks.After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising 9.6% while the broad benchmark is down 3.3%. Shares of Verizon Communication Inc. are up more than 19% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. has gained 13%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomb

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 1,100 Points After Ceasefire; Gold Stocks Charge Higher (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes soared Wednesday after President Donald Trump suspended Iran attacks for two weeks while Tehran agreed to open the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Super Micro jumped in the stock market today after the company posted an update on an investigation and gold stocks advanced.

content.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 1,100 Points After Ceasefire; Gold Stocks Charge Higher (Live Coverage)
content.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes soared Wednesday after President Donald Trump suspended Iran attacks for two weeks while Tehran agreed to open the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Super Micro jumped in the stock market today after the company posted an update on an investigation and gold stocks advanced.
